title: Knowledge Object
description: Primary unit of knowledge in the Blackstone Ecosystem. Defined by BKGC v2.0 Art. VIII–IX. Governed by BGS v1.0.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the knowledge object.

description.description: Extended description of the knowledge object's subject matter.

created_by.description: Agent ID or human identifier of the creator.

maturity_stage_history.description: Ordered history of maturity stage transitions.

jurisdiction_code.description: BKR-08/09/10 jurisdiction code. Examples: NJ, US-FED-3, MULTI:{NJ,NY}, UNCONFIRMED, GLOBAL.

jurisdiction_confirmed.description: True if jurisdiction has been confirmed by primary source research. False caps claim_status at PERS per BGS-03.2.

ccs_score.description: Constitutional Compliance Score (0–100). Weighted composite per BGS-01.

claims.description: Array of claim records forming the substance of this knowledge object.

evidence_ids.description: EV-IDs of all evidence items in the CEL supporting this KO.

counter_evidence_assessed.description: True if a systematic counter-evidence search has been conducted. Required for maturity stage Research and above.

counter_evidence_ids.description: EV-IDs of counter-evidence items, if any identified.

counter_evidence_notes.description: Narrative description of counter-evidence review findings.

temporal_current.description: True if all cited authorities have been confirmed current within the last 90 days.

temporal_confirmed_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which temporal currency was last confirmed.

review_date.description: ISO 8601 date of next scheduled review. Required at Verified stage and above.

last_modified_by.description: Agent ID or human identifier of last modifier.

integrity_status.description: Current integrity status of the knowledge object.

successor_ko_id.description: KO-ID of the successor knowledge object. Required when integrity_status = DEPRECATED.

legal_hold.description: True if this KO is under a legal hold order per BGS-19. Blocks all modification, deletion, and archival.

legal_hold_basis.description: CDR number or description of the legal hold basis.

human_review_required.description: True if human review is required before any action on this KO (triggered at RISK-H or RISK-C, or financial_amount >= 500).

financial_amount_usd.description: Financial amount at stake in USD, if applicable. Triggers human review at >= 500 per BGS-11.

applicable_disclaimers.description: BKR-14/15 disclaimer IDs required for any external output of this KO.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags for search and categorization.

notes.description: Free-form internal notes. Not included in external outputs.

CcsDimensions.description: CCS dimension scores (0–100 each). Weights defined in BGS-01. Composite = weighted sum.

citation_integrity.description: Weight: 20%. All claims traceable to authenticated sources.

provenance_completeness.description: Weight: 18%. Origin and chain of custody documented for all evidence.

jurisdiction_accuracy.description: Weight: 14%. Jurisdiction confirmed and correctly coded.

counter_evidence_review.description: Weight: 12%. Counter-evidence systematically identified and addressed.

confidence_calibration.description: Weight: 10%. Confidence level accurately reflects evidence strength.

transparency.description: Weight: 6%. Reasoning and methodology explicitly stated.

auditability.description: Weight: 4%. All steps reproducible from the audit trail.

reproducibility.description: Weight: 2%. Independent agent can reach same conclusion from same sources.

evidence_preservation.description: Weight: 2%. All evidence items preserved in CEL, none deleted.

claim_id.description: Unique claim identifier within this KO. Format: {KO-ID}-C{N}.

statement.description: The claim statement in clear, precise language.

DecisionTraceability.description: Seven-element decision traceability record. BKGC Art. XXIII.

question_posed.description: The specific question this KO addresses.

evidence_considered.description: Description of evidence reviewed, including what was excluded and why.

reasoning_applied.description: The analytical methodology used to reach the conclusion.

alternatives_rejected.description: Alternative conclusions considered and reasons for rejection.

confidence_assigned.description: The confidence level assigned and its basis.

risk_classified.description: The risk classification assigned and factors driving it.

output_delivered.description: Description of the output produced and how it was delivered.
